/usr/bin/g++-13 -Wno-stringop-overflow -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/CameraTest.dir/CameraTest/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CameraTest.dir/CameraTest/CameraTestManager.cpp.o -o CameraTest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/a3dobject/stonefish/build ../libStonefish_test.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu  -lSDL2 /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
